title: Websites + ACME SSL (nginx-only, HTTP-01 + Cloudflare DNS-01)
commits: 1b2dd7b feat(v0.3): phase 1 foundation — websites + acme skeletons, nginx I/O, bootstrap
e27b8fb feat(v0.3): phase 2 sites CRUD + reconcile — atomic conf write with rollback
b43ecc5 feat(v0.3): phase 3 PHP site type — fastcgi_pass + operator-provisioned FPM
2b7b2d6 feat(v0.3): phase 4 ACME — HTTP-01 + Cloudflare DNS-01 + auto-renew
833edca feat(v0.3): phase 5 frontend — /websites route, Add/Issue dialogs, SSL settings card
e0e05db release(v0.3.1): bump to 0.3.0, smoke-pass evidence on Rocky, v0.4 draft

in: Static, reverse-proxy, and PHP site types managed via host systemd nginx
Live nginx conf files under /etc/nginx/conf.d/dinopanel/ + thin SQLite metadata mirror
Atomic conf write with rollback on nginx -t failure
Reconcile loop (orphan detection: file-without-DB and DB-without-file)
ACME via acme-client (Node) — HTTP-01 challenge + Cloudflare DNS-01 challenge + auto-renew
Frontend /websites route, Add / Issue Cert dialogs, SSL settings card
out: Non-Cloudflare DNS-01 providers (Cloudflare only this round)
Auto-provisioned PHP-FPM container — operator-provisioned for v0.3, carried over to v0.4
Drawer/Sheet primitive for detail view — inline panel for v0.3, carried over to v0.4
ACME_EMAIL settings UI — env-only for v0.3, carried over to v0.4
External-conf import in reconcile (managed | external discriminator) — carried over to v0.4

decisionsSummary: Q2 → live nginx conf files + thin SQLite metadata
Q5 → v0.5 scheduler ('acme-renew' job, 12h cadence, renew at ≤30d)

verification.vitest: pass (full suite green at v0.3.0 release cut)
verification.liveSmokeReleasedAs: v0.3.0 — first install onto Rocky 9.4 (192.168.199.234) verified S1 static-site happy path; S2/S3/S7 added 2026-05-19 via SSH (see v0.3.1-smoke-pass)

knownFollowups: S4 ACME HTTP-01 against LE staging — needs public domain, deferred
S5 ACME DNS-01 against Cloudflare — needs real domain + CF token, deferred
S6 PHP-FPM site — needs operator-provisioned FPM container, deferred
Drawer/Sheet primitive — carried over into v0.4
Auto-provisioned PHP-FPM container — carried over into v0.4
ACME_EMAIL settings UI (env-only → settings with env fallback) — carried over into v0.4
External-conf import in reconcile (managed | external discriminator) — carried over into v0.4
